subject: Rufflet, a small eagle-like bird Pokemon with white and gray feathers, yellow beak, spreading its wings in flight
description: A framed Steam Siege card. The art shows Rufflet — a small compact bird with white and gray-blue feathering, a yellow beak, and a tuft of feathers atop its head — wings spread wide as it launches upward or glides forward. The background is an open pale sky with soft atmospheric haze, conveying motion and altitude. The bird is depicted with confident energy despite its small size, wings fully extended. The illustration style is clean and bright.
foreground: Rufflet with wings spread against open sky
background: pale open sky, soft atmospheric haze
emotion: bold and fearless — wings spread confidently, taking flight despite small stature
